overall.description: Aerial establishing shot of ancient Greek settlement Chersonesos transitions to third-person boat navigation along a rocky Mediterranean coastline. The player-controlled vessel sails past wooden docks and other ships in bright midday sun.

segments.scene_description: An aerial establishing shot shows the ancient settlement of Chersonesos perched on a rocky peninsula, surrounded by deep blue waters and distant mountains. Several sailing vessels are scattered across the bay as the location name appears on screen.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal harbor approach with wooden docks

boat slows and maneuvers alongside wooden pier structures

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to a third-person view from a sailboat approaching the harbor. The player character steers toward wooden dock structures while passing a moored vessel. Ancient stone buildings line the cliff tops to the left as the boat navigates through the clear turquoise water.

scene_state.functional_zone: open Mediterranean coastline with rocky cliffs

events.description: boat clears the harbor dock and enters open coastal waters
boat adjusts course to follow the rocky coastline

agents.ego_description: navigating the sailboat along the open coast with sail fully deployed

entered.detail: rugged rocky shoreline with clear water lapping against stones
natural rock formation arching over the water in the distance

segments.scene_description: Having passed the harbor, the boat sails along the open coastline with rugged cliffs to the left and expansive sea to the right. The wooden docks recede behind as the vessel navigates past rocky outcrops and a small beach cove, with distant rock arches visible on the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot transitions from a sweeping aerial perspective of an ancient settlement into a close-range nautical journey along a rugged Mediterranean coast. It begins with a high-altitude view of Chersonesos perched on a rocky peninsula, overlooking a deep blue bay dotted with sailing vessels and distant mountains. As the perspective descends into a third-person view, the camera follows a sailboat steering through clear turquoise waters toward wooden dock structures and stone buildings lining the cliff tops. The scene then opens up as the vessel leaves the harbor behind, sailing along an expansive coastline where the docks recede to reveal rugged cliffs and a small beach cove. Finally, the boat navigates past rocky outcrops toward the horizon, where distant rock arches emerge under the bright midday sun.
